results.title: More funding from PFAS settlements will be available for New Hampshire towns
results.description: New Hampshire has received a $4.68 million settlement disbursement from a lawsuit against Tyco Fire Products, LP, and Chemguard, Inc., which will be deposited into the New Hampshire Drinking Water and Groundwater Trust Fund to provide grants and loans to public water systems for water source protection and PFAS mitigation.

results.description: (MENAFN - Khaleej Times) Petrol rates have been hiked for the past three consecutive months due to a rally in global oil rates, rising nearly 50% between February and May By: Khaleej Times ...
